relevance_spans.text: To understand Beer model we must first meet his mentor W Ross Ashby Ashby was a pioneer in cybernetics the science of systems and control He gave us the law of requisite variety a principle as foundational to social science as gravity is to physics
the viable system model, conceived by a man named Stafford Beer. Beer wasn't your typical scientist.

title: Stafford Beer’s Viable System Model for Cybernetics (UK) 1963
